response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience across multiple industries with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React in recent roles, closely matching the primary stack. His background includes scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and enterprise tooling, with demonstrated leadership in architecture and cross-functional collaboration.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong open-source contributions and community involvement
concerns: Limited Kotlin/Java experience (though listed as secondary skill)
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework in recent roles
Part-time founder role may impact availability for rapid debugging/resolution

key_factors.factor: Relevant fullstack experience with primary stack
